example.title: Major CR options matrix: re-baseline vs reduce vs defer for added regulatory clause
example.inputs: CR-202: regulator added clause requiring 7-year transaction-log retention. Rubric bin: L. Affected: data-platform retention policy + 11 systems + 9 dashboards. Approver: Steering committee (per change-request-impact-rubric).
example.commentary: Illustrates r1 (3 viable options), r2 (scored on cost/value/risk), r3 (named approver), r4 (rationale referencing scores), r5 (no straw-men).
